name: RFantibody
description: Design de novo antibody/VHHs given a target antigen. Experimentally validated to four disease-relevant epitopes using multiple orthogonal biophysical methods.
capabilities: Design de novo antibody/VHHs given a target antigen
Experimentally validated to four disease-relevant epitopes using multiple orthogonal biophysical methods

pdbFile.description: Target antigen structure in PDB format

targetChains.description: Chain IDs of the target antigen

frameworkPdbFile.description: Custom Chothia-annotated antibody framework PDB (required when framework is 'custom')

hotspotResidues.description: Target epitope residues where C-beta distance to CDR residues would be <8 Angstrom

cdrLengths.description: Per-CDR length ranges or 'auto' to preserve input framework lengths

numDesigns.description: Number of antibody/VHH designs to generate
